description_long: This is a modern police van, primarily white with blue and yellow checkered markings along its sides and rear. The word 'POLICE' is prominently displayed in blue on both sides and the front, while the rear features 'POLICE' in bold yellow. The van has two blue light bars mounted on the roof, indicating its emergency vehicle status. The windows are tinted dark, and the vehicle features standard van doors and wheels, with a Mercedes-Benz logo visible on the front grille. Reflective red and yellow chevrons cover the rear doors for high visibility, and police insignia are present on the side panels.
description: A white police van with blue and yellow checkered markings, blue roof lights, and bold 'POLICE' text on all sides. It features reflective rear chevrons and police insignia on the sides.
description_view_0: Side view showing 'POLICE' text, blue and yellow checkered stripes, police insignia, and tinted windows.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the 'POLICE' text above the windshield, Mercedes-Benz logo, and blue roof lights.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, with 'POLICE' text, checkered stripes, and insignia visible.
description_view_3: Rear view highlighting yellow 'POLICE' text, red and yellow chevron pattern, and rear doors.
attribute_police_markings: The vehicle displays 'POLICE' in large blue letters on both sides and the front, and in yellow on the rear. Blue and yellow checkered stripes run along the lower sides and rear. The rear doors feature a red and yellow chevron pattern for high visibility. Police insignia are present on the side panels.
attribute_emergency_lights: Two blue rectangular light bars are mounted on the roof, one towards the front and one towards the rear.
attribute_police_insignia: Police insignia, featuring a crest with a crown and star, are visible on both side panels near the rear of the van, rendered in black, red, and white.
